title: Master todo list dependant on status of items on other boards

posts.author: lottetashilama (Alex Havret)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Couldn’t find an clear answer so I’m asking for help here!

I want to do a master to do list.

I want it to be populated with items on other boards whenever the item’s status is changed to ‘NEXT’ (status label that I created for that purpose) on the original board.

So everytime I change an item status to ‘NEXT’, this particular items is duplicated to the master todo list.
It is also synchronised so that when the item is done, I can change the status on the master todo list to ‘DONE’ and the item’s status is automaticaly changed to ‘DONE’ on the original board.

Thanks for your help !

Alex

posts.author: MelissaOrozco (Melissa Orozco)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Were you able to figure this out?

posts.author: greentoothbrush (ian ross)
posts.cookedHtml:
Creating items on boards based on status is Template Automation.
Then I think you have the same issue as Update Status A in Board 1, when Status A Board 2 changes to Done

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: There’s an app called Same Item Multiple Board that would do this.
